titleStmt.title: SII 15.247: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 247. (B.K. No. 117 of 1929-30.) BAILŪR, HONAWAR TALUK, NORTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab standing near the Haslara huts.
This is dated Śaka 1356, Pramādi, Kārttika ba. 10, the weekday being lost. This corresponds to 1433 A.D., November 6. The Śaka year was current.

It records an endowment made in favour of Nārāyaṇabhaṭṭa of Gujjāḍi, son of Kēśava, by Adhikāri Saṇṇu Nāyaru in conjunction with the pontiff Surēśvara-śrīpāda and the people of the Bailūr region for the exposition of the Purāṇas every day in the temple of Maḍakēśvara and also in the maṭha of the said teacher for thirty days in the month of Sōṇe(Śrāvaṇa).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇādhipatāE nama namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē tra
Ilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāyaśaṁbhavē . svasti śrīmadu rājādhirāja rāja paramēśva
ra śrī vīrapratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyara vi
jayasāṁbrājyōdayadalu śrīmanmahā puruśōttamadēvaOḍeyara bārakūra rāja
dhāniyalu Iddu tuḷu sakhavaruśa 1356 neya
pramādi saṁvatsarada kārtika bahuḷa 10 śrīmatu Adhikāri saṁṇunāyaru bayi
lūra dēśa samastaru śrīmaṁḍakēsvara dēvasthānadali nitya purāṇa naḍavaṁ tāgi barasida dharmma
śāsanada bhāśākramaveṁtaṁdare Ā dēsa samastaru rāyaṇa
purāṇavanu naḍasuvaṁtāgi Acaṁdrārkkastāviyāgi dhārāpūrvaka Eṟe
du koṭṭa dharmmastaḷaṁgaḍi muḍalu Akṣaya hitila
lasamudrada le baḍagalu Agrada vritti nālkugaḍi
ru dāri mattaṁ Eḍagulageya bāḷiṁge gaḍi māḍa parapaḷi
Uratti paḍuvalu sīmege makkaḷu parapaḷināyaka narasiṁhmana dāma paṁḍitena bhāgakuṁ
Ivarellara vrittiyu Appayagadeya hāḷi
Iṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁda Oḷage gade
māna Arddha mattaṁ kārugāla bāḷiṁge gade muḍalu Eppatu saṁnyāsi teṁkalu
saṁnyāsi dēvara vritti paḍuvalu harida hoḷe paḍuvalu hariyadēva
ḷaguḷa vritti śrīpa koṭṭadu hā 20 gadde dēśadavaru koṭṭadu mu 4 gade Ideke baṁda Eraselagede
ya kaṭṭina nīrudāri Aṁttu gadde ho 20 mane maneṭhāU
Aṁgasasi nīrudāri nidhinikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣiṇi Agāmi siddha sādhya sahitavāgi Ācaṁ drārkkasthāyi
yāgi śrīmaḍakēsvaradēvara stānadalli nitya purāṇa naḍavaṁtāgiyu surēsvara śrīpadaṁgaḷa maṭhadalli
sōṇe 30 purāṇa naḍaveṁtāgiyu Ā śrīpadaṁgaḷu dēśa samastaru gujjāḍiya nārā yaṇabhaṭṭa
riṁge Ā caṁdrārkkasthāviyāgi dharmmavāgi dhārāpūrvvakavā mulava Eṟadu koṭṭarū yī dēva
sthānadalu nityapurāṇa naḍavaṁtāgi maśadali sōṇe muvattu dinapurāṇa naḍasuvaṁtā
gi māḍikoṁḍu Iṣṭanallavanu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi mulava Eṟeyisikoṁḍaru nārā
yaṇabhaṭṭaru I Eṟadu koṭṭa sthaḷaṁgaḷiṁge tiṟumuḍe gaḍi dēvara dharmma Arugaḍi ma
ne haṇa nūga haṇa vokkalu guttage kāṇike khaḍḍāya beḷākaraṇe beḷudaṁḍa Esa O
sage biṭṭi biḍāra Ettu gāṇa modalāgi ĀUdu salva sarvvamānyavāgi dēśasamastaru kā
yida kāhu śrīpadaṁgaḷu sarvvanamasyavāgi koṭṭa dharmmasthaḷaṁgaḷakku dēśasamastaru Oppi sarvva
mānyavāgi kāIda kāhu yi dharmmasthaḷaṁgaḷanu baḍḍu I purāṇavanu naḍasi taṁnna
taṁnna saṁtati saṁtati Uḷḷaṁnnabara hiriyarāgi huccidavare AcaṁdrārkkasthāviE
sukhadiṁ bāḷuvaru huṭṭidavana hasalu salla koṭṭavana Artta salla I Uru samasta
rū taṁmma maneya dēvakāryya pitrukāryya maduve Upanayana Iṣṭakku I purā
ṇava naḍasuva bhaṭṭaru hēḷiE māḍuvaru nārāyaṇabhaṭṭaru Aṁnigara kailu
māḍikoṁḍaṁthā sthaḷaṁgaḷuviḍidu dēśadavaru Okkalu guttage Arugaḍiya
lehadida vastuva I nārāyaṇabhaṭṭara kū ṁda hāṁge teṟabēkeṁdu hēḷudu salla
Ī dharmmakke Arū tappūdu salla tapidavaru maḍakēsvaradēvara kittavaru taṁma mātāpi(ṁ)
trugaḷa śrī vāraṇāsiyalu vadhisida dōśa haru I dharmmava pālisidanaruśrīmaḍa
kēsvarapratiṣṭeya māḍisi śrī vāraṇāsiyalu taṁmma mātāpitrugaḷanu rakṣi
si sāvirakapileyanu sabrāhmaṇariṁge dānava māḍida phalava vūḍuvaru yī purāṇa Eṁ
deṁdū naḍavaṁtāgi Adhikāri saṁṇunāyaru Ā dēśasamastaranu Oḍaṁbaḍisi barasida
dharmmaśāsana svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā brahmasvaṁ haraticaya saṣṭiṁvaruśa sahasrāṇi viṣṭā
yaṁ jāyatē krimi dānapālanayōrnudhyē dānāśrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātu svargga mavāpunō
ti pālanādaccyutaṁ padaṁ Ādityacaṁdrāvanilā Ucanala dyaurbhbhomirāpōhṟidayaṁ
yamaśca Ahaśca rātriśca Ubhēca saṁdhyē dharmmaśca jyānāti narasya Urattaṁ I hadi nālku
maṁdi dharmmasākṣigaḷu sābāḷeya nārāyaṇaciṁṇeya saṁbhudattana mādhavajēti
ya nārāyaṇa Iṁtivara Ubhayōṁnmatadiṁ maḍakēsvaradēvara saṁnidhāna
da siriyāliya nāḍa sēnabōvaṇapaṁṇagaḷa maga kēśavana baradu
dū I kalla kaṭidava kōṭijana maga Isara Acāri subhamastu
Digital edition of SII 15.247 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
